nasb.text: You are my brothers; you are my bone and my flesh. Why then should you be the last to bring back the king?’

esv.text: You are my brothers; you are my bone and my flesh. Why then should you be the last to bring back the king?’

cnv.text: 你們是我的兄弟，我的骨肉至親，為甚麼在請王回來的事上，倒落在人後頭呢？’

ccb.text: 你们是王的弟兄，是王的骨肉，为什么迟迟没有迎接王回宫？’
